title: Building Agent Interfaces: Lessons from Chrome DevTools (MCP) for Agents — Michael Hablich, Google
summary: Michael Hablich describes lessons from building Chrome DevTools MCP for agents, including decomposing monolithic tools into focused ones, rewriting error messages for agent self-healing, and measuring interface efficiency via tokens per successful outcome. The work emphasizes tool discoverability and safety considerations like prompt injection resistance.
